# gauge — Circular _(HTML/CSS)_

```css
@forward '@lucca-front/scss/src/components/gauge';
```

```html
<svg
	class="gauge${…}${…}${…}"
	width="${…}"
	height="${…}"
	viewBox="0 0 ${…} ${…}"
	${…}
>

	<circle class="gauge-circleBar" cx="${…}" cy="${…}" r="${…}"></circle>
</svg>
```
